info.name: Microsoft Azure Kafka Restproxy APIs
info.description:
This is a Kafka Restproxy Api lists.

Contact Support:
 Name: HDInsight

item.name: Microsoft Azure Consume Records Using A Simple Consumer

query.description: Number of records to consume (optional). By default count is 1. It returns either count of records or 6 megabytes of data, which is smaller.

variable.description: (Required) Topic to consume the records from
(Required) Partition ID to consume the records from

request.description: Consume records from one partition of a topic beginning with a specific offset. By default count is 1. It can read maximum of 6 megabytes of data at once

query.description: Number of records to consume (optional). By default count is 1. It returns either count of records or 6 megabytes of data, which is smaller.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get A List Of Kafka Brokers

request.description: Get a list of Kafka brokers with hostname, port, and broker id

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Metadata About A Specific Kafka Topic Partition

variable.description: (Required) Partition ID to get metadata for

request.description: Get metadata about a specific Kafka topic-partition with partition ID, earliest offset, latest offset, leader, replicas, and in-sync replicas

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Metadata About All Partitions For A Specific Topic

request.description: Get metadata about all partitions for a specific topic with partition ID, earliest offset, latest offset, leader, replicas, and in-sync replicas

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get A List Of Kafka Topics

request.description: Get a list of Kafka topics. If it is a newly created topic, please wait a few seconds for it to show up.

variable.description: (Required) Topic to produce the records to

request.description: Produce records to a topic in Kafka. If producing records to a newly created topic, please wait a few seconds for the topic to show up.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Check The Status Of Kafka Rest Proxy Server

request.description: Check the status of Kafka Rest proxy server

variable.description: (Required) Name of the topic to be created

request.description: Create a topic in Kafka with topic configuration
